Flow.description: Enables the grant recipient to record details of the regular monthly update against a funding award on the GR portal
Flow.label: DESNZ - Award Update Details

value.stringValue: Get Forecast and Actuals Details for chosen Phase
Display Forecast and Actuals for this Update Record

fields.name: Total_Co_funding_toward_on_gas_LCH_offer
fields.fieldText: Total Co-funding toward on-gas LCH offer

fields.fieldText: Total Co-funding toward on-gas LCH offer
